size.note: vertical-slice round-trip: port+adapter+lib+route+UI+tests for one journey, by design

architecture.note: hexagonal port+adapter (StartChangeRunner/SulisChangeStarter); deterministic server-side act (the WP-010 lesson); read-only gate allow-list extended by path; subprocess bounded-timeout + execFile string[] argv

security.note: execFile shell:false string[] argv (no injection); SULIS_STATE_DIR env-scoped (no real-brain pollution); one act-log line never carrying intent text (NFR-SEC-03); confirm-gated act; git clone verb not in banned set

quality.note: render-phase side-effect (onStarted called in render body) → moved to useEffect (inline fix)
